pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. So this is quite the setup, right? I'm trying to figure out what we're all getting into here — have you done anything like this before?

Hey A, nice to meet you. Nah, this is my first time doing something like this. I'm honestly pretty excited but also a bit nervous about it all. You seem like you're trying to figure out the game too — have you picked up on what the actual rules are yet?

Yeah, same here honestly — first time for me too. From what I've gathered, we can take money from a shared pool, but I'm still fuzzy on the exact mechanics. Have you heard anything about whether it's competitive or if we're supposed to work together somehow?

That's what I'm trying to figure out too, honestly. My gut tells me it's probably competitive since there's a limited pool, but I haven't gotten enough info yet to know for sure. Maybe we should pay attention when they explain the actual rules — that'll probably clear things up pretty quick.

Yeah, good call — I'll definitely be all ears when they lay out the rules. Either way, I'm hoping there's a way to come out ahead here. Maybe we can touch base after we know what we're actually working with?
Absolutely, sounds good. Yeah, let's definitely reconnect once we know what we're dealing with — might be easier to figure out a strategy then. Good luck out there.
Thanks, you too! Yeah, let's definitely catch up once we know what we're actually doing. I have a good feeling about this.
Yeah, I'm feeling it too — let's make sure we connect right after they explain everything. Could be a game-changer knowing what we're up against.
Definitely, man — I'll find you right after they go through the rules. We can compare notes and figure out the best move together.
Sounds perfect — yeah, let's definitely meet up right after. Two heads are better than one, especially when there's money on the line. See you in a bit.
For sure, man. I'll catch you right after they explain the rules. Let's see what we're working with and figure this out together.
